title: catalpa × erubescens var. purpurea
intro: Catalpa × erubescens var. purpurea, also known as the Purple Catalpa, is a deciduous tree or shrub belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Purple Catalpa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
